CustomField.description: Also called Buyer's Original Value. Should NOT include deferred mortgages, grants, public contributions or anything resembling a subsidy. If a land trust, this is what goes into your ground lease. It's the number to which the resale formula is applied. NOTE: As of 1.9 this field is no longer being used by the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Instead, the Hub now uses the formula field Subsidized Price.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Also called Buyer's Original Value. Should NOT include deferred mortgages, grants, public contributions or anything resembling a subsidy. If a land trust, this is what goes into your ground lease. It's the number to which the resale formula is applied.
CustomField.label: Effective Purchase Price
